features: 【Create 20 Magic Potions】Welcome to the enchanting world of magical fairy potions! With this kit, you'll have the opportunity to create 20 extraordinary potions. We've included 5 captivating recipes, while also encouraging you to unleash your creativity and concoct entirely unique ones. Personalize your potions with our blank labels. Share the joy with your friends as you embark on a journey to explore this new realm of magic together! Join us and create your own marvel!

【Inspire Creativity and Imagination】Unleash the magic of creativity with this unique DIY magic potion craft kits. Designed toys for kids aged 6-12, it allows them to express their creativity and create personalized potions. With the included materials, kids can make decorative potions in their favorite colors. Complete with a display stand and labels, this potion making toy kit encourages creative play and empowers girls age 6 7 8 9 10 11 12 to unleash their imagination.

【Potion Making Kit for Children】 Unleash your creativity and step into a world of magic with this DIY potion kit! Complete with a recipe book, 20 bottles, wings, stickers, and an array of magical elements like colored stones, gentian juice, and fairy glitter, this kit is designed to inspire boundless imagination. With handy tools like a bowl and funnel, children can easily create their own magical potions. Experience the wonders of this amazing kit and showcase your creative talents today!

【Magical Family Fun】Embark on an enchanting journey of DIY magic potions! This kit sparks creativity and strengthens the bond between parents and children. It's not just for kids - parents and grandparents can join in creating their own fairy potions. With hands-on activities, it nurtures skills, sparks imagination, and boosts confidence. Create cherished memories during family time with this perfect choice for interactive play!

【Surprise Gift for Girls Boys Age 6-12 】Unleash the magic with this captivating playset, designed as the perfect gift for kids aged 6-12. It offers both educational and entertaining experiences, as children create decorative potions and immerse themselves in a world of enchantment. Ideal for curious minds, it's an unforgettable present for any occasion, be it Christmas or a birthday. Watch as their creativity soars and endless surprises unfold with this mesmerizing magic potion set!
